_comment: chinweb news feed — edit this file to update the news section on chinweb.html

_schema.title: required — headline text
_schema.description: optional — short summary shown under the title
_schema.tag: required — one of: update | news | release | blog | dev
_schema.url: optional — if set, the whole card becomes a link

items.title: BTFLY.SOCIAL spec docs now live
items.description: The architecture and design specification for BTFLY is now published — covering Global Login, node types, auth flow, and the monetisation plan.

items.title: chin web launched
items.description: A new Ecosia-powered search page is live under chinberclart.dev — searches the web and plants trees.

items.title: Privacy policy published
items.description: A unified privacy policy covering chinberclart.dev, BTFLY, Cloudlight Games, and all future projects is now live.

items.title: Shockwave — early development
items.description: The first of three interconnected Cloudlight games is in active development. More details coming soon.

items.title: Portfolio site rebuilt
items.description: chinberclart.dev has been rebuilt from scratch with a new design system shared across all Cloudlight projects.
